v3Proxy.note: ERC1967Proxy fronting v3Implementation. Interact with V3 at this address.

honkVerifier.note: Active verifier used by V3 (set via setHonkVerifier tx 0x6b3679624bb38df9e3654e232efd918005e791a6e6385bdc7ac99e121c567d4e). Generated using bb 5.0.0-nightly.20260324 to match aggregator's @aztec/bb.js@5.0.0-nightly.20260324 (proof format alignment).

honkVerifierLibraries.note: Linked libraries split out of HonkVerifier to fit the EIP-170 24,576-byte runtime limit (per commit 4f2f34b). These are the libraries linked to the active honkVerifier above.

honkVerifierDeprecated.note: Taras's original HonkVerifier — generated using older bb tooling. Replaced because bb.js@4.2.1 vs older bb CLI version produced incompatible proof format (SumcheckFailed on real proofs). Kept on chain for reference; not used by V3 post-setHonkVerifier.

p256VerifierAdapter.note: Wraps Daimo's P256 verifier (fallback-only, raw 160-byte calldata interface) to V3's IP256Verifier.verify() interface. Strips Solidity function selector via abi.encodePacked. Set on V3 via setP256Verifier tx 0xcd2ba13b01388aa36e13356450e2c87f47a366969037bd0ed5c6fa02826f16be. Source: contracts/src/P256VerifierAdapter.sol.

p256VerifierDaimo.note: External canonical Daimo P-256 verifier per RIP-7212. Fallback-only interface; expects 160 bytes raw calldata (hash || r || s || x || y). Wrapped by p256VerifierAdapter — V3 does NOT call this directly anymore.

registeredDevices.purpose: smoke test edge device (persistent key at edge/edge-test-key.pem)

phase1FirstE2E.note: First successful real on-chain submitProof via smoke test (edge -> aggregator -> V3). ProofSubmitted event emitted. Commit c58da32.

notes: Phase 1 (real on-chain E2E) closed 2026-05-14 with commit c58da32. Pipeline edge -> aggregator -> V3.submitProof -> ProofSubmitted event functional.

HonkVerifier compiled to 27,749 B runtime exceeds EIP-170 24,576 B. Fixed in commit 4f2f34b by changing HonkVerificationKey.loadVerificationKey and RelationsLib.accumulateRelationEvaluations from internal to public so the libraries deploy separately.
The V3 test suite uses MockHonkVerifier and does NOT exercise the real bb-generated HonkVerifier. Real-proof testing happens via edge/scripts/sepolia_smoke.py against deployed V3.
Admin role transfer to a multisig is out of scope for this MVP deployment (security-critical; handled separately by Petro).
deployer and operator are the same address for this MVP testnet deployment.

bb tooling pinned at version 5.0.0-nightly.20260324 (matches local nargo 1.0.0-beta.20). aggregator's @aztec/bb.js MUST stay at 5.0.0-nightly.20260324 to match deployed HonkVerifier — proof format alignment requires this exact version.
